form.label: Pi-hole Security Analytics
form.description: Behavioral DNS detections, unusual names, error activity, and encrypted-DNS indicators.

search.query: | eval first_label=mvindex(split(query,"."),0),label_len=len(first_label),digits=len(replace(first_label,"[^0-9]","")),digit_ratio=digits/label_len | where label_len>=24 OR (label_len>=16 AND digit_ratio>0.35) | stats dc(query) as candidates

| timechart span=5m count(eval(reply_code="NXDOMAIN")) as nxdomain | eventstats avg(nxdomain) as baseline stdev(nxdomain) as deviation | eval zscore=if(deviation>0,(nxdomain-baseline)/deviation,0) | fields _time nxdomain zscore
| stats count as total count(eval(action="blocked")) as blocked by src | where total>=20 | eval block_rate=round(100*blocked/total,2) | sort - block_rate | head 20

| eval first_label=mvindex(split(query,"."),0),label_len=len(first_label),digits=len(replace(first_label,"[^0-9]","")),hyphens=len(replace(first_label,"[^-]","")),digit_ratio=round(digits/label_len,2) | where label_len>=24 OR (label_len>=16 AND digit_ratio>0.35) OR hyphens>=4 | stats count as queries dc(src) as clients values(src) as sources values(action) as actions by query label_len digit_ratio | sort - queries | head 200
| where NOT query_type IN ("A","AAAA","HTTPS","PTR") | stats count as queries dc(query) as domains values(query) as sample_domains by src src_name query_type | sort - queries | head 100

| where dnssec="BOGUS" OR ede_code>0 | stats count as events values(dnssec) as dnssec values(ede_code) as ede_codes values(ede_text) as ede_text values(reply_code) as replies by src query | sort - events | head 200

| eval q=lower(query) | where match(q,"(^|\\.)(dns\\.google|cloudflare-dns\\.com|mozilla\\.cloudflare-dns\\.com|security\\.cloudflare-dns\\.com|dns\\.quad9\\.net|doh\\.opendns\\.com)$") | stats count as queries values(action) as actions dc(src) as clients values(src) as sources by query | sort - queries
